items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Momentum stocks just saw one of the biggest reversals in five years. What usually happens next.
items.summary: There had been ample warnings that stocks with price momentum had shot up too quickly, and on Thursday gravity reasserted itself.
items.text_it: Le azioni Momentum hanno appena visto una delle più grandi inversioni degli ultimi cinque anni. Cosa succede di solito dopo.
items.summary_it: C'erano stati ampi avvertimenti sul fatto che le azioni con slancio dei prezzi erano aumentate troppo rapidamente e giovedì la gravità si era riaffermata.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Oil futures rise after U.S., Iran trade fire; stock futures quiet after court rejects Trump’s tariffs
items.summary: Oil futures moved higher late Thursday while stock-index futures were little changed after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf, and after a federal court struck down President Donald Trump’s backup tariff plan.
